title: Gourmeo Oval Bread Proofing Basket - 30cm (11 3/4 inch) Banneton for Bread Baking for Proving 500-700g Dough - Rattan Proving Basket with Linen Liner - Includes Recipe Booklet
features: Made from Natural Material: Our bread proofing baskets are crafted from real rattan, ensuring an effective and attractive option for your baking needs. The bread proofer also doubles as a regular bread basket.

Linen Liner Included: Enhance your bread-making experience with the included linen liner, adding elegance when using as a bread basket. The linen allows dough enough space to grow and keeps heat loss to a minimum.

Easy to Use: Our proving baskets for bread making are suitable for both professional and home bakers, allowing you to achieve perfect loaves every time. Simply sprinkle with flour before placing the dough in to rest and you won't get any sticking!

Classic Oval Shape: Create beautiful, artisanal loaves using proofing baskets for bread baking. Get a classic oval shape, complete with the imprinted lines characteristic of traditional bread. Your bread will not only taste great, but look great too!

Basket Size: Our banneton baskets measure 30 cm x 15 cm (11.8 x 5.8 inches). Delivery includes the bread prover basket, a linen liner, and a booklet containing instructions and recipes to help get you started.
description: Product Description Rattan proofing basket with linen liner Bake your own artisinal bread at home with the Gourmeo proofing basket. This basket is ideal for professional and home bakers to create beautifully shaped loaves of bread. Make bread that is soft inside and crispy outside, all whilst controlling the ingredients that go into the food you eat. Made of natural materials The basket is made of natural rattan and includes a beautiful linen liner. Our proofing baskets are both functional and attractive on display in the kitchen. Separate for cleaning After use, leave the basket to dry for one day (faster in the sun). The liner should be rinsed as needed and stored in a dry, ventilated area. Get inspired to bake The proofing basket comes with a booklet containing instructions and recipes. Get nspired to create new and tasty kinds of bread at home!
